mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dividend_reinvest_settings (user_id, stock_code, is_enabled) VALUES (#{userId}, #{stockCode}, #{isEnabled}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE is_enabled = VALUES(is_enabled), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT d.id, d.user_id, d.stock_code, d.is_enabled, d.created_at, d.updated_at, s.stock_name FROM dividend_reinvest_settings d LEFT JOIN tradable_stocks s ON s.stock_code = d.stock_code WHERE d.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY d.id DESC
